response.justification: Despite extensive software engineering experience, the candidate lacks direct C++ development experience in industrial automation, high-performance systems, or secure coding per IEC 62443 standards — core requirements for this role. Their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web technologies, with only a brief, non-detailed mention of C++ in a 6-month NI LabWindows role over a decade ago, insufficient to meet the 8–12 year C++ expertise requirement.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across diverse domains.
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical mentoring.
Proven ability to deliver scalable, event-driven systems and CI/CD infrastructure.
concerns: Minimal recent or substantial C++ experience — core requirement for the role.
No evidence of industrial automation, IoT protocols (e.g., OPC UA, Modbus), or IEC 62443 compliance.
Lacks demonstrable experience with multi-threaded, low-latency C++ systems or message brokers in production.
